---
title: "Sadman Shafiq "
---

I am a doctoral student in the Public Policy and Political Economy program of University of Texas at Dallas.  My research interests are development and how new innovations can inform development policies.

### More Information

Interests:

  * Data Science 
  * Time series modeling
  * Intersection between development and innovation

### Contact me

[sadman.shafiq@utdallas.edu](mailto:sadman.shafiq@utdallas.edu)

[Website](https://SadmanShafiq117.github.io)
